title: STREET OUTREACH ALLIANCE PROJECT - 211info
text: COMMUNITY OUTREACH THROUGH RADICAL EMPOWERMENT STREET OUTREACH ALLIANCE PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management/coordinated care, community trainings/education, Naloxone distribution/overdose education, safe sex items, syringe services, and harm reduction supplies. Eligibility: Ages 16-29 experiencing homelessness or housing instability Hours: Requests for supplies: Tuesday 10am-2pm Supply drops occur on Tuesday 4pm-7pm Email (541) 870-0036 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 870-0036 Call or text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Cottage Grove, Eugene, and Springfield SITE HOURS: No standard hours, by appointment only Services: Contraception Mobile Health Care Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Opioid Antidote Distribution Personal/Grooming Supplies Safe Sex Supplies Street Outreach Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - ZEPHYR HOUSE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION DISTRIBUTION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICE NAVIGATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
